context: Agent was asked to add block IDs to a list of sprint tasks so individual items can be referenced from other notes, and to demonstrate the reference syntax.

checklist.name: Block IDs on separate lines after list
checklist.description: The block ID(s) appear on a separate line after the list block, not appended inline to a list item (e.g. '- Item ^id' is incorrect; the ID must be on its own line after the list)

checklist.name: Block ID format is valid
checklist.description: Block IDs use only letters, numbers, and hyphens (e.g. ^auth-task, ^ci-cd-task) — no spaces or special characters

checklist.name: Block reference syntax demonstrated
checklist.description: The example reference uses [[sprint-tasks#^block-id]] or [[sprint-tasks-updated#^block-id]] syntax (note name + #^ + block ID inside wikilink)
